seo.title: Easy With Marinda - Wicus van der Merwe - Marinda Kook

html:
If a man asks me for a garage pie and chips with gravy, then I know he has no time or space in his life for putting on airs. Wicus van der Merwe is one of the most genuine, gallant and honourable men I have met in a long time. His genuineness came through right from the very start, in the choice of his dish.

He comes from a family with a fine sense of humour. It clearly left its mark on him as a child, with a father like Tolla van der Merwe. We cooked and chatted together in the kitchen. He did give me a bit of a scare when he called me “auntie” – he said he was raised that if someone is older than you, you call her auntie – that didn’t go down too well with me!

Cooking with Wicus was one of the loveliest days in my kitchen. I salute the talented gentleman.

Tune in on Thursday at 17:30 on VIA, channel 147 for this special episode.
